title: Notorious
writer: Ben Hecht, John Taintor Foote, Alfred Hitchcock
actors: Cary Grant, Ingrid Bergman, Claude Rains
plot: The daughter of a convicted German spy is asked by American agents to gather information on a ring of German scientists in South America. How far will she have to go to ingratiate herself with them?
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 4 wins & 3 nominations total
